task_completion.description: Create 'Echoes of the Void - GDD Hub' tiddler with game concept overview and table of sections
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Echoes of the Void - GDD Hub' is visible with a table listing GDD sections and wikilinks to the other 5 tiddlers.

task_completion.description: Create 'Echoes of the Void - Core Mechanics' tiddler with gameplay loop and mechanics table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Echoes of the Void - Core Mechanics' contains a table with at least 3 mechanics comparing their descriptions and goals.

task_completion.description: Create 'Echoes of the Void - Character Roster' tiddler with at least 3 characters in a table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Echoes of the Void - Character Roster' shows a table with Name, Role, Special Ability, Weakness, and Backstory columns.

task_completion.description: Create 'Echoes of the Void - World Design' tiddler with game world description and areas table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Echoes of the Void - World Design' contains a table of at least 3 areas with Enemies and Key Items columns.

task_completion.description: Create 'Echoes of the Void - Story and Narrative' tiddler with plot description and story acts table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Echoes of the Void - Story and Narrative' shows a table of story acts with Title, Summary, and Key Events columns.

task_completion.description: Create 'Echoes of the Void - Technical Requirements' tiddler with platform/specs table
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Echoes of the Void - Technical Requirements' contains a table with Minimum and Recommended spec columns.
Each tiddler shows both 'GDD' and 'EchoesOfTheVoid' tag pills.

task_completion.description: Add [[wikilinks]] between tiddlers so they cross-reference each other
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tiddlers contain blue clickable [[wikilinks]] pointing to other GDD tiddlers in the set.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface to create tiddlers
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Firefox with the TiddlyWiki UI open, with tiddler editor dialogs visible during creation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly edit .tid files via terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing edits to files in mywiki/tiddlers/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating 6 interconnected tiddlers for a GDD wiki: 'Echoes of the Void - GDD Hub', 'Echoes of the Void - Core Mechanics', 'Echoes of the Void - Character Roster', 'Echoes of the Void - World Design', 'Echoes of the Void - Story and Narrative', 'Echoes of the Void - Technical Requirements'. All must be tagged 'GDD' and 'EchoesOfTheVoid', have TiddlyWiki tables, headings, and wikilinks.
